name: Use leave balance before deadline
subject: Reminder: use your annual leave balance before {{deadline}}
body:
Dear {{name}},

Please plan and use your remaining annual leave balance before the deadline below.

Your leave should be scheduled and submitted before {{deadline}}.

  • Review your balance in the timesheet portal
  • Coordinate coverage with your supervisor
  • Contact HR if you need help scheduling leave

Thank you for keeping your leave records up to date.

name: Use 50% of balance before deadline
subject: Reminder: use at least 50% of your leave balance before {{deadline}}
body:
Dear {{name}},

Company policy requires using at least 50% of your annual leave balance before {{deadline}}.

Please submit your planned leave in the timesheet portal as soon as possible.

  • Check how much leave you have already taken this year
  • Plan the remaining balance before the deadline
  • Speak with your supervisor if dates need adjustment

Early planning helps maintain crew coverage across shifts.

name: Shift report reminder
subject: Shift report pending — {{date}}
body:
Dear {{name}},

Your shift report for {{date}} has not been submitted yet.

Please complete your report in QIPP so operations records stay accurate and up to date.

  • Log in to QIPP and open the Personnel section
  • Submit notes, handover details, and any incidents from your shift
  • Contact your shift in charge if you need access or support

Timely reports support safe, well-coordinated plant operations.

name: Monthly planned leaves
subject: Planned leave roster — {{month}}
body:
Dear {{name}},

Attached is the planned leave timeline for {{month}}, filtered to leave segments overlapping that month.

Please review the roster and confirm your team's coverage plans.

  • Open the attached Excel file for the full crew breakdown
  • Flag any conflicts or coverage gaps to your supervisor
  • Update the leave planner if plans have changed

Contact your supervisor if you need to adjust leave plans.

name: Training course reminder
subject: Reminder: complete {{courseTitle}}
body:
Dear {{name}},

This is a reminder to complete the training course {{courseTitle}} in the QIPP Training Hub.

{{courseDescription}}
Open course in Training Hub
  • Complete all modules and any required assessments
  • Your progress is tracked automatically in QIPP
  • Contact your supervisor if you need scheduling support

Keeping training current supports safe and compliant operations.
